arts.ttl: PSV leave it late to find winner in five-goal thriller against Shakhtar Donetsk
arts.sum: Watch the highlights as PSV Eindhoven fightback from 2-0 down to beat Shakhtar Donetsk in a remarkable match in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: PSV leave it late to record stunning win over Shakhtar Donetsk
arts.sum: PSV Eindhoven scored three times late on to earn a 3-2 win over Shakhtar Donetsk in the Champions League on Wednesday. Peter Bosz decided to restore Luuk de Jong to the starting line-up for the must-win game in Eindhoven, despite Ricardo Pepi scoring a hattrick at the weekend.
